components.name: Solaris Server
components.licenseSummary: Predominantly MIT; discord.js is Apache-2.0; joi is BSD-3-Clause; dotenv is BSD-2-Clause

components.name: Solaris Archive Service
components.licenseSummary: MIT and MIT OR Apache-2.0; mongodb is Apache-2.0

components.name: Solaris Notify Service
components.licenseSummary: MIT and MIT OR Apache-2.0; mongodb and async-nats are Apache-2.0

components.name: Solaris Dashboard Service
components.licenseSummary: MIT and MIT OR Apache-2.0; mongodb and bollard are Apache-2.0

vulnerabilities.description: MongoBleed: unauthenticated heap memory disclosure via zlib decompression
Use-after-free in sharded clusters by authenticated user
Authenticated read of uninitialized stack memory
Non-FIPS algorithms used when FIPS mode enabled
CRL Distribution Point matching logic flaw - CRLs not considered authoritative
vulnerabilities.fixAvailable: Awaiting async-nats upstream update or pin override

vulnerabilities.description: Server panic via malicious compression on leafnode port (pre-auth)
Pre-auth server panic via leafnode malformed message
MQTT session hijacking via Client ID
MQTT plaintext password disclosure via monitoring
Synchronous throw in SNICallback crashes process
Race condition in buffer allocation leaks memory
HTTP/2 crash on malformed HEADERS frame
TLS client cert memory leak DoS
TLS PSK/ALPN callback crash + FD leak

86 vulnerabilities reported by Trivy scanner (3 critical, 8 high, 14 medium, 60 low, 1 unknown). Mostly in system libraries (zlib, libxml2, kernel). Many may be false positives — Debian security team marks some as not-affected when vulnerable code path is not built.
vulnerabilities.fixAvailable: Rebuild images regularly with docker build --no-cache to pull latest bookworm-slim with patches

remediation.action: npm audit fix (fixes glob, minimatch, picomatch, socket.io-parser, qs, brace-expansion, diff)
Wait for async-nats update or pin rustls-webpki override
Unmaintained warning — no security impact yet
